deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native per-event hook plugin mechanism that subsumes this schema
title: Feature RUNTIME
description: Per-event lists of runtime API calls. The dispatcher hook for each Claude Code event invokes the calls in declaration order and aggregates typed returns.

Stop.description: Runs after every Claude Code response. Used for drift checks, active-override alerts, and policy re-injection on detected drift.

SessionStart.description: Runs once per session at startup. Used for welcome banners, policy injection, and runtime-flag display.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Runs each time the user submits a prompt. Used for counter-driven policy refresh.

PreToolUse.description: Runs before every tool invocation. rabbit-cage owns this slot exclusively (scope-guard); no other feature should declare PreToolUse APIs.
